# kanidm_service_account (Data Source)

Reads a Kanidm service account.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) ID of the service account to look up.

### Read-Only

- `displayname` (String) Display name.
- `entry_managed_by` (Set of String) Set of account or group IDs that manage this service account.
